stem: A juvenile pine tree had a height y of 95 centimeters when it was first measured and grew an average of 6.3 centimeters per month for the first 12 months. Which equation best represents this situation, where x is the number of months after it was first measured and y is the height, in cm, of the tree?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. The initial value is 95, and the rate of growth is 6.3 cm/month, so y = 6.3x + 95.

Other choices swap or repeat the constants incorrectly.
